name: MIRA Development
description: AI-powered industrial maintenance platform — development orchestration
mission: Build, test, and maintain MIRA — the AI-powered industrial maintenance diagnostic platform for factory equipment. Ensure all code meets safety standards (NFPA 70E, OSHA 1910), passes the 7-regime test suite, and follows conventional commit format.
_note: This is a reference template. Create the company via the Paperclip UI at http://<tailscale-ip>:3200, then configure agents with the JSON files in paperclip/agents/. Replace __MIRA_HOME__ in agent configs with the actual MIRA repo path on the Mac Mini.
